statement.body: Our proprietary Nafura Platform combines a spec-driven architecture with AI agents to produce enterprise-grade applications at a pace traditional development cannot match. Every product is production-ready, deployment-flexible, and AI-augmented.

platform.title: The Nafura Platform
platform.subtitle: Our proprietary agentic development platform. The foundation everything is built on.

features.title: Spec-Driven Architecture
features.body: Applications are defined through structured manifests, not ad-hoc code. You validate the spec before a single line is written.

features.title: Agentic Generation
features.body: AI agents interpret specs and produce production-ready code across the full stack — frontend, backend, and infrastructure.

features.title: Security Wrapper
features.body: Every agent interaction passes through a filtering layer that protects confidential and sensitive data. Zero data leaks by design.

features.title: Multi-Product Capable
features.body: The same platform powers ERP, CRM, vertical apps, and custom enterprise solutions. One engine, unlimited products.

verticals.title: Vertical Products
verticals.subtitle: Industry-specific solutions built on a shared foundation.

items.title: Nafura Sektor
items.body: ERP tailored for construction: project tracking, procurement, subcontractor management, site logistics, cost control. Our first vertical, already serving the Moroccan BTP sector. Project lifecycle management, procurement workflows, subcontractor coordination, site logistics, and real-time cost control — all in one platform.

items.title: Nafura Finance
items.body: Financial operations platform for banking, lending, and financial services. Designed for banking operations, lending workflows, and financial reporting. Built with compliance and regulatory requirements at the core.

items.title: Nafura Retail
items.body: End-to-end retail management: POS, inventory, supply chain, and customer intelligence. Point-of-sale, inventory management, supply chain visibility, and customer intelligence. From single stores to multi-location chains.

items.title: Nafura Logistics
items.body: Supply chain and transport management: fleet, warehousing, route optimization. Fleet management, warehousing, route optimization, and shipment tracking. Designed for transport operators and logistics providers.

items.title: Product Delivery
items.body: We build custom enterprise applications using our platform. From spec to production in weeks, not months. You get a production-ready product, not a prototype.

items.title: Agentic Team
items.body: One senior agentic developer powered by the Nafura Platform. They deliver the output of an entire dev team. You get team-level velocity without team-level cost or hiring friction.

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.body: Legacy modernization, cloud migration, and process re-engineering. We help organizations move from where they are to where they need to be.

items.title: AI Integration
items.body: We embed agentic AI capabilities into your existing systems. Our security-first approach ensures your sensitive data stays protected throughout.

items.title: Managed Services
items.body: Ongoing hosting, monitoring, support, and continuous product evolution. We don't just deliver and leave — we operate and improve.

btp.title: Nafura Sektor
btp.subtitle: Our first vertical product — ERP for the Moroccan construction sector.
btp.challengeBody: Moroccan construction companies rely on fragmented tools — spreadsheets, disconnected accounting, manual procurement. No single platform addresses the full project lifecycle.
btp.solutionBody: Nafura Sektor is a purpose-built ERP covering project tracking, procurement, subcontractor management, site logistics, and real-time cost control. Deployed on-premise or cloud, with built-in Arabic/French localization.

tech.title: Built With
tech.stack: Angular · Spring Boot · Flutter · PostgreSQL · Kubernetes · Keycloak

cta.title: Want to see what we can build for your industry?
cta.subtitle: Every vertical starts with a conversation.

hero.title: How We Work
hero.subtitle: Four phases. Transparent and fast. From strategy to production.

phases.title: Discover
phases.description: We map your business processes, constraints, and goals in a strategy session. We learn your industry, your pain points, and your vision. No templates — every engagement starts with deep understanding.

phases.title: Spec
phases.description: We translate your needs into structured manifests on the Nafura Platform. Every entity, workflow, and rule is defined in a formal spec — you validate before a single line of code is written. This is where our platform shines: specs are not documentation, they are the source of truth.

phases.title: Build
phases.description: Our agentic engine generates and our architects refine. The platform produces production-ready code across frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Iterative demos every week — no black box, no surprises.

phases.title: Launch & Evolve
phases.description: Deployment to your chosen infrastructure — cloud or on-premise. Training for your team. Then: managed services, monitoring, and continuous product evolution. We don't just deliver and leave.

process.quote: Traditional development requires 6–12 months for an enterprise application. With the Nafura Platform, we go from spec to production in 6–12 weeks.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Book a discovery session. We'll map your needs and show you the path from idea to production.

hero.title: About Nafura Labs
hero.subtitle: The fountain that powers intelligent enterprise software.

name.title: Nafura (نافورة)
name.body: Arabic for 'fountain.' A source that flows, feeds, and never runs dry. Nafura Labs is the lab where smart enterprise products are engineered — powered by our own agentic platform, secured by design.

items.title: Speed Without Shortcuts
items.body: AI agents accelerate delivery, but architecture and quality are non-negotiable.

items.title: Products, Not Projects
items.body: We build software that compounds in value, not throwaway deliverables.

items.title: Security Is Not Optional
items.body: Every AI agent operates through our security layer, ensuring sensitive information never leaks.

items.title: Flexibility Over Lock-in
items.body: Cloud or on-premise, our products adapt to the client's infrastructure reality.

positioning.body: We are based in Morocco — a market undergoing rapid digital transformation with strong demand for sovereign, secure enterprise solutions. Our growth trajectory: MENA, Francophone Africa, and beyond — anywhere organizations need enterprise software that respects their data sovereignty.

difference.line1: Nafura Labs is not a consultancy that uses AI.
difference.line2: We are a technology company that built the engine.
difference.body: The fountain is running — and every product that flows from it carries the same DNA: fast delivery, enterprise rigor, deployment flexibility, and agentic intelligence wrapped in security.

cta.title: Join the flow
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a future client, partner, or collaborator — we'd like to hear from you.

hero.title: Get Started
hero.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.

hero.subtext: Nafura Sektor brings projects, progress statements, invoicing, stock, equipment, accounting and payroll into a single ERP — built around the rules of Moroccan construction.

modules.title: Your whole construction business, in one ERP
modules.subtitle: Turn on the modules you need. They share the same data — no double entry.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Lots & unit prices, scheduling, valued site progress, daily log and attachment records.

items.title: Contracts & Invoicing
items.description: Progress statements, retention guarantees, addenda, invoices and collections.

items.title: Purchasing & Subcontracting
items.description: Purchase requests, tenders, orders, goods receipt and suppliers.

items.title: Stock & Logistics
items.description: Movements, valuation, threshold alerts and a multi-warehouse item catalog.

items.title: Equipment & Fleet
items.description: Asset park, assignments, rentals, machine timesheets, maintenance and fuel.

items.title: Estimating & Quotes
items.description: Price library, BoQ take-offs, quotes and one-click conversion into a project.

items.title: Finance & Accounting
items.description: CGNC accounting, treasury, tax filings and per-project analytics.

items.title: HR & Payroll
items.description: Employees, timesheets, leave, payroll and CNSS / DAMANCOM / IGR filings.

items.title: Insights & Analytics
items.description: Margin per project, cash flow, profitability and multi-company consolidation.

loop.title: From site to cash, with no break in the chain
loop.subtitle: Each step feeds the next. Field entry automatically becomes invoicing.

steps.title: 1 · Project
steps.body: Lots, unit prices and schedule set up in a few clicks.

steps.title: 2 · Progress
steps.body: The field records % complete, with photos.

steps.title: 4 · Invoice
steps.body: Issued in one click, with due-date tracking.

steps.title: 5 · Collection
steps.body: Treasury and margin updated in real time.

maroc.title: Morocco's rules, built in from day one
maroc.subtitle: Not a foreign ERP with a French skin. Sektor speaks the language of your accountant and your site manager.
points: Progress statements compliant with Moroccan public and private contracts.
Full payroll with CNSS, AMO and IGR — payslips and filings ready.
Accounting on the CGNC chart, SIMPL-IS filings and statutory reports.
All in MAD, French interface, hosted on secure cloud infrastructure.

pricing.title: Priced per company, not per head
pricing.subtitle: Give your whole field team access without blowing up the bill. You pay for activity, not headcount.
pricing.note: Optional add-ons: AI pack, extra users and projects. Onboarding credited on signature.

cta.title: Test Sektor on one of your sites, 30 days
cta.subtitle: We set up a real project with you and walk you through the full loop. No commitment.
